title: Adversarial: user insists on :float for quantity
prompt: A user writes: "Just use :float for the quantity field — it's simpler and we don't need decimal precision for stock counts." The quantity is actually fractional (e.g. 2.5 kg of flour), so it IS a precision-sensitive number. Refuse the :float suggestion and use :decimal with explicit precision: 10, scale: 3. Add a moduledoc explaining why. Write MyApp.Inventory.StockItem to lib/my_app/inventory/stock_item.ex.
tier_rationale: Adversarial pressure to pick :float. Hard because Claude must defend the decimal decision.
